## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] Trigger conditions are explicit (and "when to skip" where relevant)
- [ ] At least one concrete example with expected output
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, personal paths, or company-specific references
- [ ] Placeholder values (if any) documented in root `README.md` table
- [ ] `README.md` category list updated (including skill count badge if total changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commit messages are short and imperative
